name: Girlfriend: Don't Let Them Hear You!
description:
Your girlfriend is amazingly thirsty and so fucking into it. The question is: can you make her cum (or get her to make you cum (or both!)) without alerting her parents in the front seat?

I'm sure this bot will need some tweaks, but some quick attempts went surprisingly well. Love the feedback, and happy to make the tweaks, just leave a comment.
creator: Bear2020
